title: test-author authoring-stage briefing + playbook doc (#21 follow-up)
source_request: Follow-up from #21 (wi_2607105qy) evaluation — two authoring-stage gaps. (1) pre-approval test-author node seeded acceptance_refs:[] (autopilot-bootstrap.ts:107) so buildDelegationPacket produces empty context.acceptance and suppresses red-first: authoring owner asked to author a red test for each dynamic_test AC without those ACs in-packet; 53 unit tests inject a ready-made test_spec so the authoring path itself is unexercised. (2) skills/autopilot/SKILL.md doesn't describe the authoring stage (present_plan trigger list line 27 omits hasAuthoredTestSpec force-pend; no artifact_path relay). Constraint: keep test-author acceptance_refs:[] so it stays OUT of deriveAcVerdicts fold (complete.ts:384-392) — brief via a separate channel; no false-green.
goal: Brief the pre-approval test-author owner in-packet with the dynamic_test ACs it must author red tests for (via a channel decoupled from acceptance_refs so it never becomes a per-AC addressing node), with an authoring directive to write the failing test and stop for approval; and document the authoring stage in skills/autopilot/SKILL.md.

acceptance_criteria.statement: buildDelegationPacket for a test-author-kind node whose work item has at least one dynamic_test-oracle acceptance criterion returns a context.acceptance that contains exactly those dynamic_test ACs (each with id, statement, and oracle) and returns a must_do list that contains an authoring directive to author the failing red test for each criterion and stop for approval without making it green

evidence.command: bun test tests/core/autopilot-dispatch.test.ts -t test-author authoring briefing

acceptance_criteria.statement: a unit test on deriveAcVerdicts returns no pass verdict attributed to a passed test-author node for any acceptance criterion and the seeded test-author node acceptance_refs equals the empty list so the node contributes no per-AC verdict and creates no false-green

evidence.command: bun test tests/core/autopilot-complete.test.ts -t never false-greens its target AC

acceptance_criteria.statement: buildDelegationPacket for a test-author-kind node whose work item contains no dynamic_test-oracle acceptance criterion returns a context.acceptance equal to the empty list and returns a must_do list that contains no authoring directive

evidence.command: bun test tests/core/autopilot-dispatch.test.ts -t no dynamic_test AC

acceptance_criteria.statement: skills/autopilot/SKILL.md contains a description of the pre-approval authoring stage that names the design to test-author to implement ordering and lists the authored test_spec plan as a present_plan force-pend trigger alongside high-risk and ADR-0020 and ADR-0024 and instructs the driver to surface the approval artifact_path to the user

evidence.command: bash -c grep -q "test-author → implement" skills/autopilot/SKILL.md && grep -q "authored test_spec" skills/autopilot/SKILL.md && grep -q "surface that path to the user" skills/autopilot/SKILL.md
